summary: TASK-006: Added @crewspace/core dependencies — zod (schema validation), eventemitter3 (typed event emitter), @types/node (Node.js types), rimraf (clean script). Set type:module for ESM-first, added peer dep on TypeScript >=5.0.0, sideEffects:false for tree-shaking. Build, typecheck, lint, and all 3 tests pass. Branch pushed and ready for QA review.
